{{Quote|These Modbreks…semi-sentient, wispy, ephemeral beings, hairless as slugs…save for the grotesque blue manes on their undeveloped heads…with their huge eyes and tiny noses and mouths and pointy pale faces…yuck! To put it kindly, they're absolutely repulsive!|Modbreks described unflatteringly by [[Feltipern Trevagg/Legends|Feltipern Trevagg]]|audio=Modbreks.flac|<ref name="Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale">{{StoryCite|story=Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
'''Modbreks''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of pale-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] (or possibly [[Near-Human]]s). They had small noses and mouths, sharp facial features and large eyes. They were hairless, save for a mane of blue hair. At least one family of Modbreks lived in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the desert [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

Some [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|males]] found female Modbreks physically attractive, though the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] tax collector [[Feltipern Trevagg/Legends|Feltipern Trevagg]] found them to be wispy and insubstantial in appearance, and merely semi-[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] in intellect.
